raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I was aware for the first time that my credit had gone down because Barclays Bank had reported unpaid invoices with credit agencies. 
On XX/XX/XXXX, I called Barclays Bank phone ( XXXX ) and they informed me that there was a charge of {$71.00} on XX/XX/XXXX, from a company called XXXX XXXX. 
First. I do not recognize who the XXXX company is, nor have I bought anything from that company at all. 
Secondly. I do not understand why Barclays Bank never notified me about this situation and did not send me a billing statement informing me of these charges. I never received any letters by regular mail or by email. According to the information received, the total owed, including late payments and interest, is {$140.00}. 
Third. The only letter I received from Barclays Bank was dated XX/XX/XXXX, from the XXXX detection unit. See Exhibit A According to my bank, XXXX Bank reported me with credit agencies and my credit history decreased by XXXX points XXXX Bank 's actions are wrong and must be sanctionable. 
XXXX Bank must resolve this situation immediately. The Bank must remove the fraudulent charge on my account, including all late fees, and notify all credit agencies about the error.
